title: Low-Angle Fashion Campaign Photograph
sourceTitle: Low Angle Product Closeup Fashion Campaign Photo AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Low-angle fashion campaign photograph of confident adult fashion model holding Aurora Serum very close to the camera. Subject: Aurora Serum dominates the foreground in the model hand with glossy packaging detail visible, while confident adult fashion model remains full-body visible in the background wearing bold colorful outfit with strong contrast tones. Scene: Clean pure white studio background with high-key beauty advertising atmosphere, crisp shadows, and ultra-clean commercial composition. Composition: Exaggerated low-angle perspective: hand and product dominate the foreground, full-body pose visible behind, wide stance, dynamic posture, sharp focus on product, and slight depth of field on the model. Signature Elements: Preserved low angle product closeup fashion campaign photo source structure, fixed composition hierarchy, stable visual rhythm, and reusable content controls remain consistent across generated variants. Style: Modern beauty advertising aesthetic, commercial studio photography, bold colorful fashion styling, ultra-clean composition, premium packaging detail, glossy product realism, and confident campaign energy. Color Palette: Pure white studio background, hero product packaging colors, bold contrast tones from bold colorful outfit with strong contrast tones, natural skin tones, and crisp shadow grays. Lighting: High-key commercial studio lighting, sharp product focus, crisp shadows, glossy packaging highlights, and slight depth falloff on the model. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
